lessons.name: Boiling Water
lessons.description: Learn how to boil water safely and effectively.
steps: Place the pot on the stove.
Turn on the heat to high.
Wait for the water to reach a rolling boil.
lessons.safety: Always use oven mitts when handling hot pots.

lessons.name: Basic Knife Skills
lessons.description: Understand how to use a knife safely in the kitchen.
steps: Choose the right knife for the task.
Hold the knife correctly with a firm grip.
Use a cutting board to protect your surfaces.
lessons.safety: Keep knives sharp to prevent accidents.
